827	  have key : AwayComparison.Inverts (s r * sprod s ((σ ∘ j.succAbove) ∘ i.succAbove))
828	      (cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
829	    AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd
830	      (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r)
831	        (dvd_trans (sprod_succAbove_dvd s (σ ∘ j.succAbove) i) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)))
832	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap _ M)
833	  simp only [cechCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
834	  rw [cechCoeff_transport_eq_comparison s M r heqc hinvc,
835	    AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply, AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply,
836	    AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply]
837	  · exact key
838	  · rw [CombinatorialCech.comp_succAbove_swap]; exact key
839	
840	/-- **Positive-degree exactness of the localised section {\v C}ech complex.**
841	After localising the standard-cover section {\v C}ech complex at a spanning element
842	`s r`, the resulting complex of away-localisations `A_σ = M_{s r · s_σ}` is exact in
843	positive degrees.  This is the dependent combinatorial core
844	`CombinatorialCech.depDiff_exact` fed the concrete coface `cechCoface`, prepend
845	`cechPrepend`, and the compatibilities `cech_hu`/`cech_hsh`/`cech_hcomm`.  It is the
846	`Function.Exact` input that `exact_of_isLocalized_span` consumes node by node in the
847	L1 categorical→module bridge (the remaining gaps: the finite-product localisation
848	`∏_σ M_{s_σ}` and the sheaf-section identification `F(D(s_σ)) = M_{s_σ}`). -/
849	lemma cechLocalized_exact (m : ℕ) :
850	    Function.Exact
851	      (CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r)
852	        (m := m + 1))
853	      (CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r)
854	        (m := m + 2)) :=
855	  CombinatorialCech.depDiff_exact (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) r
856	    (cechCoface s M r) (cechPrepend s M r)
857	    (cech_hu s M r) (cech_hsh s M r) (cech_hcomm s M r) m
858	
859	end CechLocalized
860	
861	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — the un-localised section Čech module complex `D•`
862	
863	`D^m` is the product `∏_{σ : Fin m → ι} M_{s_σ}` of away-localisations of
864	`M = Γ(Spec R, F)` at the multi-index products `s_σ = ∏ₖ s_{σ k}`; its differential
865	is the alternating sum of the canonical localisation comparison maps (index deletion
866	drops a factor, so `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`).  This is the concrete `R`-module complex `D•`
867	of `lem:section_cech_homology_exact` that the section Čech complex is identified
868	with.  Positive-degree exactness is reduced — via `exact_of_isLocalized_span` — to
869	the localised complexes already shown exact in `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`;
870	the bridge is the localisation-transitivity lemma
871	`AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule` (applied here as
872	`dToCech_isLocalizedModule`). -/
873	
874	namespace SectionCechModule
875	
876	open CechLocalized AwayComparison
877	
878	variable {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {ι : Type*} (s : ι → R)
879	variable (M : Type u) [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
880	
881	/-- The un-localised section Čech coefficient `D_σ = M_{s_σ}`. -/
882	abbrev dCoeff {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) : Type u :=
883	  LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M
884	
885	/-- The un-localised coface comparison `δ : M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}} → M_{s_σ}` (R-linear), the
886	canonical localisation map for the divisibility `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`. -/
887	noncomputable def dCoface (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
888	    dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
889	  comparison
890	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
891	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
892	    (Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
893	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M))
894	
895	/-- The un-localised differential `d : D^m → D^{m+1}` as an `R`-linear map: the
896	alternating sum of cofaces, assembled with `LinearMap.pi` over the output tuple. -/
897	noncomputable def dDiff (m : ℕ) :
898	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :=
899	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
900	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (dCoface s M m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
901	
902	/-- Apply form of `dDiff`: the alternating sum of cofaces of the deleted faces. -/
903	lemma dDiff_apply (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
{"items":[{"name":"exact_of_isLocalized_span","kind":"lemma","file":".lake/packages/mathlib/Mathlib/RingTheory/LocalProperties/Exactness.lean"}]}

903	lemma dDiff_apply (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
904	    dDiff s M m t σ
905	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • dCoface s M m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
906	  rw [dDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
907	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
908	
909	variable (r : ι)
910	
911	/-- The per-index localisation comparison `M_{s_σ} → M_{s_r · s_σ}` carrying the
912	un-localised coefficient to the `cechCoeff` coefficient localised at `s_r`. -/
913	noncomputable def dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
914	    dCoeff s M σ →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
915	  comparison
916	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
917	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
918	    (Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r))
919	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
920	
921	/-- **Transitivity payoff**: `dToCech` exhibits the localised coefficient
922	`cechCoeff = M_{s_r · s_σ}` as the localisation of the un-localised coefficient
923	`M_{s_σ}` away from the spanning element `s_r`.  Direct from
924	`AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule`; this is the per-coefficient input the
925	`exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction of the section Čech complex consumes. -/
926	lemma dToCech_isLocalizedModule {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
927	    IsLocalizedModule.Away (s r) (dToCech s M r σ) := by
928	  haveI inst : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ * s r))
929	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M) := by
930	    rw [mul_comm]; infer_instance
931	  unfold dToCech
932	  exact comparison_isLocalizedModule (a := sprod s σ) (b := s r) _ _ _
933	
934	/-- **Per-coface localisation naturality**: the localised coface `cechCoface`
935	intertwines the per-index comparison `dToCech` with the un-localised coface
936	`dCoface`.  Both composites are away-comparison maps from `M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}}` to
937	`M_{s_r · s_σ}`, hence equal by `comparison_comp`.  This is the square that, summed
938	over the alternating signs, identifies the localised differential
939	`IsLocalizedModule.map (dDiff)` with `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` —
940	the final brick of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction. -/
941	lemma cechCoface_dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
942	    (x : dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
943	    cechCoface s M r m σ j (dToCech s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) x)
944	      = dToCech s M r σ (dCoface s M m σ j x) := by
945	  simp only [cechCoface, dToCech, dCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
946	  rw [comparison_comp_apply, comparison_comp_apply]
947	  exact Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_trans (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j) (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r)))
948	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
949	
950	/-- **Differential-naturality square** (the heart of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span`
951	reduction): localising the un-localised differential `dDiff` at a spanning element
952	`s_r` — via the per-index comparisons `dToCech` — yields the localised differential
953	`CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)`.  Summing the per-coface squares
954	`cechCoface_dToCech` over the alternating signs.  Combined with
955	`dToCech_isLocalizedModule`, `IsLocalizedModule.pi`, and the uniqueness of
956	`IsLocalizedModule.map`, this identifies the localised `dDiff` with the
957	exact complex `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
958	lemma dToCech_comm (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :
959	    CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r) (m := m)
960	        (fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (t σ))
961	      = fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (dDiff s M m t σ) := by
962	  funext σ
963	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
964	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => ?_
965	  rw [map_zsmul, cechCoface_dToCech]
966	
967	/-! ### Assembly of step (a): positive-degree exactness of `D•`
968	
969	The localised differential at a fixed index `r`, bundled as an `R`-linear map
970	(`locDiff`), so that `IsLocalizedModule.map` uniqueness identifies it with the
971	localisation of `dDiff`.  Everything here is at a *fixed* index `r : ι` (no
972	`Classical.choose`), hence friction-free; the spanning-element bookkeeping is
973	confined to the final `dDiff_exact`. -/
974	
975	/-- R-linear underlying map of the localised coface `cechCoface` (the `comparison`
976	before `.toAddMonoidHom`). -/
977	noncomputable def cechCofaceLin (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
978	    cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
979	  comparison
980	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
981	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
982	    (Inverts.of_dvd (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j))
983	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
984	
985	lemma cechCoface_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
986	    (x : cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
987	    cechCoface s M r m σ j x = cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j x := rfl
988	
989	/-- The localised section Čech differential at index `r`, as a bundled `R`-linear
990	map (mirrors `dDiff` with the localised cofaces). -/
991	noncomputable def locDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
992	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
993	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
994	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
995	
996	lemma locDiff_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ)
997	    (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
998	    locDiff s M r m t σ
999	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1000	          (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
1001	  rw [locDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
1002	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
1003	
1004	/-- `locDiff` agrees, as a raw function, with the localised combinatorial
1005	differential `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` already shown exact. -/
1006	lemma locDiff_eq_depDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1007	    ⇑(locDiff s M r m)
1008	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ)
1009	          (cechCoface s M r) (m := m) := by
1010	  funext t σ
1011	  rw [locDiff_apply]
1012	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff]
1013	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => by rw [cechCoface_apply]
1014	
1015	/-- Positive-degree exactness of the bundled localised differential, transported
1016	from `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
1017	lemma locDiff_exact (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1018	    Function.Exact (locDiff s M r (m + 1)) (locDiff s M r (m + 2)) := by
1019	  rw [locDiff_eq_depDiff, locDiff_eq_depDiff]
1020	  exact CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact s M r m
1021	
1022	/-- The product localisation map `D^m → ∏_σ M_{s_r·s_σ}` at index `r`. -/
1023	noncomputable def fLoc (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1024	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
1025	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => dToCech s M r σ ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj σ
1026	
1027	lemma fLoc_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1028	    fLoc s M r m t σ = dToCech s M r σ (t σ) := by
1029	  simp only [fLoc, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.proj_apply]
1030	
1031	/-- `fLoc` exhibits the product localised coefficient as the localisation of `D^m`
1032	away from `s_r` (from `IsLocalizedModule.pi` + `dToCech_isLocalizedModule`). -/

instance IsLocalizedModule.of_linearEquiv_right (e : M'' ≃ₗ[R] M) [hf : IsLocalizedModule S f] :
    IsLocalizedModule S (f ∘ₗ e : M'' →ₗ[R] M') where
  map_units s := hf.map_units s
  surj x := by
    obtain ⟨⟨p, s⟩, h⟩ := hf.surj x
    exact ⟨⟨e.symm p, s⟩, by simpa using h⟩
  exists_of_eq h := by
    simp_rw [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearEquiv.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply] at h
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hf.exists_of_eq h
    exact ⟨c, by simpa only [Submonoid.smul_def, map_smul, e.symm_apply_apply]
      using congr(e.symm $hc)⟩

variable (M) in
lemma isLocalizedModule_id (R') [CommSemiring R'] [Algebra R R'] [IsLocalization S R'] [Module R' M]
    [IsScalarTower R R' M] : IsLocalizedModule S (.id : M →ₗ[R] M) where
  map_units s := by
    rw [← (Algebra.lsmul R (A := R') R M).commutes]; exact (IsLocalization.map_units R' s).map _
  surj m := ⟨(m, 1), one_smul _ _⟩
  exists_of_eq h := ⟨1, congr_arg _ h⟩

namespace LocalizedModule

/--
If `g` is a linear map `M → M''` such that all scalar multiplication by `s : S` is invertible, then
there is a linear map `LocalizedModule S M → M''`.
-/
noncomputable def lift' (g : M →ₗ[R] M'')
    (h : ∀ x : S, IsUnit (algebraMap R (Module.End R M'') x)) : LocalizedModule S M → M'' :=
  fun m =>
  m.liftOn (fun p => (h p.2).unit⁻¹.val <| g p.1) fun ⟨m, s⟩ ⟨m', s'⟩ ⟨c, eq1⟩ => by
    dsimp only
    simp only [Submonoid.smul_def] at eq1
    rw [Module.End.algebraMap_isUnit_inv_apply_eq_iff, ← map_smul, eq_comm,
      Module.End.algebraMap_isUnit_inv_apply_eq_iff]
    have : c • s • g m' = c • s' • g m := by
      simp only [Submonoid.smul_def, ← g.map_smul, eq1]
    have : Function.Injective (h c).unit.inv := ((Module.End.isUnit_iff _).1 (by simp)).1
    apply_fun (h c).unit.inv
    rw [Units.inv_eq_val_inv, Module.End.algebraMap_isUnit_inv_apply_eq_iff, ←
      (h c).unit⁻¹.val.map_smul]
    symm

lemma IsLocalizedModule.of_restrictScalars (S : Submonoid R)
    {N : Type*} [AddCommMonoid N] [Module R N] [Module A M] [Module A N]
    [IsScalarTower R A M] [IsScalarTower R A N]
    (f : M →ₗ[A] N) [IsLocalizedModule S (f.restrictScalars R)] :
    IsLocalizedModule (Algebra.algebraMapSubmonoid A S) f where
  map_units x := by
    obtain ⟨_, x, hx, rfl⟩ := x
    have := IsLocalizedModule.map_units (f.restrictScalars R) ⟨x, hx⟩
    simp only [← IsScalarTower.algebraMap_apply, Module.End.isUnit_iff] at this ⊢
    exact this
  surj y := by
    obtain ⟨⟨x, t⟩, e⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.surj S (f.restrictScalars R) y
    exact ⟨⟨x, ⟨_, t, t.2, rfl⟩⟩, by simpa [Submonoid.smul_def] using e⟩
  exists_of_eq {x₁ x₂} e := by
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.exists_of_eq (S := S) (f := f.restrictScalars R) e
    refine ⟨⟨_, c, c.2, rfl⟩, by simpa [Submonoid.smul_def]⟩

lemma IsLocalizedModule.of_exists_mul_mem {N : Type*} [AddCommMonoid N] [Module R N]
    (S T : Submonoid R) (h : S ≤ T) (h' : ∀ x : T, ∃ m : R, m * x ∈ S)
    (f : M →ₗ[R] N) [IsLocalizedModule S f] :
    IsLocalizedModule T f where
  map_units x := by
    obtain ⟨m, mx⟩ := h' x
    have := IsLocalizedModule.map_units f ⟨_, mx⟩
    rw [map_mul, (Algebra.commute_algebraMap_left _ _).isUnit_mul_iff] at this
    exact this.2
  surj y := by
    obtain ⟨⟨x, t⟩, e⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.surj S f y
    exact ⟨⟨x, ⟨t, h t.2⟩⟩, e⟩
  exists_of_eq {x₁ x₂} e := by
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.exists_of_eq (S := S) (f := f) e
    exact ⟨⟨c, h c.2⟩, hc⟩

449	  obtain ⟨n, g, f, rfl, hcov⟩ := hc
450	  refine cechCohomology_isZero_of_iso _
451	    ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).mapIso
452	      (qcoh_iso_tilde_sections F).symm) p ?_
453	  exact htilde n g f hcov p hp
454	
455	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — Serre vanishing on affines (assembly reduction) -/
456	
457	/-- **Serre vanishing on affines, reduced to the tilde {\v C}ech-vanishing leaf** (Stacks 02KG).
458	Instantiates the basis-comparison criterion `cech_eq_cohomology_of_basis` (01EO) at the affine
459	cover system `affineCoverSystem R`, taking the whole affine `⊤ = D(1)` for the basic open: the
460	absolute cohomology `Hᵖ(Spec R, F) = Extᵖ(jShriekOU ⊤, F)` of a quasi-coherent `F` vanishes for
461	`p > 0`, modulo the standard-cover tilde {\v C}ech vanishing `htilde`.  Carries
462	`[EnoughInjectives (Spec R).Modules]` exactly as `cech_eq_cohomology_of_basis` does.  Project-local:
463	verifies the full Lane-1 assembly end-to-end, so that the blueprint targets `affine_cech_vanishing_qcoh`
464	and `affine_serre_vanishing` both reduce to the single residual `htilde` (the change-of-base-to-`R_f`
465	leaf). -/
466	theorem affine_serre_vanishing_of_tildeVanishing {R : CommRingCat.{u}}
467	    [EnoughInjectives (Spec R).Modules] (F : (Spec R).Modules) [F.IsQuasicoherent]
468	    (htilde : ∀ (n : ℕ) (g : Fin n → R) (f : R),
469	        (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f : (Spec R).Opens)
470	          = ⨆ i : ULift.{u} (Fin n), PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (g i.down) →
471	        ∀ p, 0 < p →
472	          IsZero (cechCohomology
473	            (fun i : ULift.{u} (Fin n) => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (g i.down))
474	            ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj
475	              (tilde (moduleSpecΓFunctor.obj F))) p))
476	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 0 < p)
477	    (e : CategoryTheory.Abelian.Ext (jShriekOU (⊤ : (Spec R).Opens)) F p) : e = 0 :=
478	  cech_eq_cohomology_of_basis (affineCoverSystem R)
479	    (affine_cech_vanishing_qcoh_of_tildeVanishing F htilde)
480	    ⊤ ⟨1, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen_one⟩ p hp e
481	
482	end AlgebraicGeometry

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — composite away-localisation (route B, change-of-ring)

The route-B change-of-ring transfer (`lem:away_comparison_isLocalizedModule`, used by
`dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway`) needs the elementary fact that *localising twice*
— first `M ⇝ M_f` at `powers f`, then `M_f ⇝ N` at `powers (algebraMap R R_f a)` over the
localisation ring `R_f` — presents `N` as the single away localisation `M_a`, provided `f` is
already inverted once `a` is (`a^j = f·h`, i.e. `f ∈ √(a)`).  This is the module analogue of
`Localization.Away f` then `Localization.Away a = Localization.Away a` when `f ∣ aⁿ`. -/

namespace AwayComparison

/-- **Composite of two away localisations is an away localisation.**  See the section
docstring.  The `R`-linear composite `gN ∘ mkf : M → N` exhibits `N` as `M` localised at
`Submonoid.powers a`, given `a^j = f * h` (so `f` divides a power of `a`). -/
lemma isLocalizedModule_comp_away
    {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u} [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
    {Rf : Type u} [CommRing Rf] [Algebra R Rf]
    {Mf : Type u} [AddCommGroup Mf] [Module R Mf] [Module Rf Mf] [IsScalarTower R Rf Mf]
    {N : Type u} [AddCommGroup N] [Module R N] [Module Rf N] [IsScalarTower R Rf N]
    (f a h : R) {j : ℕ} (hfa : a ^ j = f * h)
    (mkf : M →ₗ[R] Mf) [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers f) mkf]
    (gN : Mf →ₗ[Rf] N) [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf a)) gN] :
    IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) ((gN.restrictScalars R) ∘ₗ mkf) := by
  have smulN : ∀ (r : R) (y : N), r • y = (algebraMap R Rf r) • y :=
    fun r y => (IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul Rf r y).symm
  have smulMf : ∀ (r : R) (y : Mf), r • y = (algebraMap R Rf r) • y :=
    fun r y => (IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul Rf r y).symm
  -- `a^j = f h` lifts to `a^{j n} = f^n h^n`
  have hfa' : ∀ n : ℕ, a ^ (j * n) = f ^ n * h ^ n := fun n => by
    rw [pow_mul, hfa, mul_pow]
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- map_units: `a` acts invertibly on `N` (as `algebraMap R Rf a` does)
    rintro ⟨x, n, rfl⟩
    rw [Module.End.isUnit_iff]
    have hb : Function.Bijective
        (⇑(algebraMap Rf (Module.End Rf N) ((algebraMap R Rf a) ^ n))) :=
      (Module.End.isUnit_iff _).1 (by
        rw [map_pow]
        exact (IsLocalizedModule.map_units gN
          ⟨algebraMap R Rf a, Submonoid.mem_powers _⟩).pow n)
    have hfun : ⇑(algebraMap R (Module.End R N) (a ^ n))
        = ⇑(algebraMap Rf (Module.End Rf N) ((algebraMap R Rf a) ^ n)) := by
      funext y
      simp only [Module.algebraMap_end_eq_smul_id, LinearMap.smul_apply, LinearMap.id_apply]
      rw [smulN, map_pow]
    rw [hfun]; exact hb
  · -- surjectivity
    intro y
    obtain ⟨⟨mf, u⟩, hu⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.surj (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf a)) gN y
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := u.2
    obtain ⟨⟨m0, v⟩, hv⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.surj (Submonoid.powers f) mkf mf
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := v.2
    -- `a^k • y = gN mf`
    have hay : (a ^ k : R) • y = gN mf := by
      rw [smulN, map_pow]
      rw [Submonoid.smul_def, hk] at hu; exact hu
    -- `f^l • mf = mkf m0`
    have hfm : (f ^ l : R) • mf = mkf m0 := by
      rw [Submonoid.smul_def, hl] at hv; exact hv
    refine ⟨⟨h ^ l • m0, ⟨a ^ (j * l + k), j * l + k, rfl⟩⟩, ?_⟩
    rw [Submonoid.smul_def]
    show (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • y = gN (mkf (h ^ l • m0))
    rw [pow_add, hfa' l, map_smul, ← hfm, map_smul]
    rw [mul_smul, mul_smul, hay]
    -- goal: (f^l * h^l) • (a^k • y) ... = h^l • (f^l • gN mf) ; rearrange
    rw [mul_smul, ← map_smul gN, ← hfm] -- careful
    ring_nf
    sorry
  · sorry

/-- **Route-B positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module complex
`D•` over a standard *sub*cover of `D(f)`** (`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`,
module core).  Here `s = g` need NOT span the unit ideal of `R`; only its image `s/1`
spans the unit ideal of the away ring `R_f` (`hspan`), and each `s i` lies in `√(f)`
(`hmem`).  The complex `∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is then exact in positive degrees.

Route B (change-of-ring): instantiate `dDiff_exact` over `R_f = Localization.Away f` with
the module `M_f = LocalizedModule (powers f) M` and the spanning family `s/1`, then transport
the resulting positive-degree exactness back to the `R`-side along the degreewise additive
isomorphisms `M_{s_σ} ≅ (M_f)_{s_σ}` (`AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` + the
universal `IsLocalizedModule.iso`), which intertwine the alternating-sum localisation
differentials. -/
lemma dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway [Finite ι] (f : R)
    (hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k)
    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤)
    (m : ℕ) :
    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
  classical
  set Rf := Localization.Away f with hRf
  set Mf := LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers f) M with hMf
  set g' : ι → Rf := fun i => algebraMap R Rf (s i) with hg'
  -- `R_f`-side positive-degree exactness (the black-box reuse of `dDiff_exact`).
  have Hf : Function.Exact (dDiff g' Mf (m + 1)) (dDiff g' Mf (m + 2)) :=
    dDiff_exact g' Mf hspan m
  -- `sprod g' σ` is the image of `sprod s σ`.
  have hsprod : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin n → ι), sprod g' σ = algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ) := by
    intro n σ; simp only [g', sprod, map_prod]
  -- per (nonempty) `σ`: `f` divides a power of `sprod s σ`.
  have hdvd : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), ∃ k, f ∣ sprod s σ ^ k := by
    intro n σ
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hmem (σ 0)
    refine ⟨k, ?_⟩
    have he : sprod s σ ^ k = s (σ 0) ^ k * (∏ x : Fin n, s (σ x.succ)) ^ k := by
      rw [sprod, Fin.prod_univ_succ, mul_pow]
    rw [he]; exact hk.mul_right _
  -- the composite localisation structure map `M → M_f → (M_f)_{s_σ}` localises `M` at `s_σ`.
  have inst_comp : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
      IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M) := by
    intro n σ
    obtain ⟨k, h, hh⟩ := hdvd σ
    haveI : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ)))
        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf) := by
      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
    exact AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away f (sprod s σ) h hh
      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)
      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf)
  -- the per-σ `R`-linear comparison `(M_f)_{s_σ} ≅ M_{s_σ}` (Rf-side → R-side).
  let eσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), dCoeff g' Mf σ ≃ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
    fun {n} σ =>
      haveI := inst_comp σ
      (IsLocalizedModule.iso (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)).symm
  -- `eσL τ` undoes the composite structure map: it sends `compMap τ mval ↦ mk_{s_τ} mval`.
  have heσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (τ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) (mval : M),
      eσL τ ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf)
          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval))
        = LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ)) M mval := by
    intro n τ mval
    haveI := inst_comp τ
    exact DFunLike.congr_fun (IsLocalizedModule.iso_symm_comp (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ))
      ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
        LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)) mval
  -- per-coface naturality: `eσ` intertwines the two cofaces.
  have nat : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 2) → ι) (j : Fin (n + 2))
      (z : dCoeff g' Mf (σ ∘ j.succAbove)),
      eσL σ (dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j z)
        = dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) z) := by
    intro n σ j z
    haveI := inst_comp (σ ∘ j.succAbove)
    -- reduce to elements `compMap (σ∘d) mval` by localisation extensionality
    have key : (eσL σ).toLinearMap ∘ₗ (dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j).restrictScalars R
        = (dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j) ∘ₗ (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove)).toLinearMap := by
      apply IsLocalizedModule.ext (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove)))
        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)
        (fun x => (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)).isUnit_powers x)
      apply LinearMap.ext; intro mval
      simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars, Function.comp_apply,
        LinearEquiv.coe_coe]
      -- LHS
      have hL : dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j
            ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) Mf)
              (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval))
          = (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf)
              (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval) := by
        simp only [dCoface]
        exact AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ _
      rw [hL, heσL σ mval, heσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) mval]
      -- RHS
      simp only [dCoface]
      exact (AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ mval).symm
    exact DFunLike.congr_fun key z
  -- bundle the per-σ comparisons into product `AddEquiv`s.
  let E : (n : ℕ) → ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff g' Mf σ) ≃+
      ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff s M σ) :=
    fun n => AddEquiv.piCongrRight (fun σ => (eσL σ).toAddEquiv)
  -- the ladder squares.
  have sq : ∀ r : ℕ,
      (dDiff s M (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (E r).toAddMonoidHom
        = (E (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (dDiff g' Mf (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom := by
    intro r
    apply AddMonoidHom.ext; intro x
    simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
      LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
    funext σ
    show dDiff s M (r + 1) (fun τ => eσL τ (x τ)) σ
      = eσL σ (dDiff g' Mf (r + 1) x σ)
    rw [dDiff_apply, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun j _ => ?_)
    rw [map_zsmul, nat]
  exact Function.Exact.of_ladder_addEquiv_of_exact (E m) (E (m + 1)) (E (m + 2))
    (sq m) (sq (m + 1)) Hf

end SectionCechModule

/-- **(c, ladder transport) Underlying-group exactness over a standard *sub*cover of `D(f)`.**
Same ladder transport as `sectionCechAbExact`, but the `R`-module exactness input is the
route-B `SectionCechModule.dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway` (the cover spans the unit ideal only
after change of base to `R_f`), so `s` need not span the unit ideal of `R`. -/
private lemma sectionCechAbExact_loc [Finite ι] (f : R)
    (hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k)
    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤)
    (q : ℕ) :
    Function.Exact
      (ConcreteCategory.hom
        (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)) q))
      (ConcreteCategory.hom
        (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)) (q + 1))) := by
  have sq : ∀ r : ℕ,
      (ConcreteCategory.hom
            (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)) r)).comp
          (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s r).symm.toAddMonoidHom
        = (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s (r + 1)).symm.toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (dDiff s M (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom := by
    intro r
    apply AddMonoidHom.ext
    intro z
    simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
      LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
    rw [AddEquiv.eq_symm_apply]
    exact sectionCechCofaceMatch M s r z
  exact Function.Exact.of_ladder_addEquiv_of_exact
    (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s q).symm (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s (q + 1)).symm
    (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s (q + 2)).symm (sq q) (sq (q + 1))
    (dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway s M f hmem hspan q)

end SectionCechTilde

IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) :=
  sectionCech_homology_exact M s hs p hp

/-- **Standard *sub*cover {\v C}ech vanishing for the tilde sheaf — the route-B residual**
(`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`, Stacks 02KG via
`lemma-cech-cohomology-quasi-coherent-trivial`).  Let `s : ι → R` be a finite family with
`D(f) = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)` (so `{sᵢ}` covers the basic open `D(f)`, spanning only `√(f)`, NOT necessarily
the unit ideal of `R`).  Then the section {\v C}ech complex of `~M` over `{D(sᵢ)}` has vanishing
homology in all positive degrees.

This is the residual `htilde` of the 02KG cone: the cover is of a *proper* `D(f)`, so it is proved
by change of base to `R_f = Localization.Away f` (where `{sᵢ/1}` does span the unit ideal),
through `sectionCechAbExact_loc` (which feeds the change-of-ring exactness
`SectionCechModule.dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway` into the tilde-bridge ladder).  The covering
hypothesis `hcov` supplies both the `R_f`-spanning datum (mirroring
`affine_cover_span_localizationAway`) and the radical membership `sᵢ ∈ √(f)`. -/
theorem sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat.{u} R)
    {ι : Type u} [Finite ι] (s : ι → R) (f : R)
    (hcov : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f : (Spec R).Opens)
      = ⨆ i, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) := by
  -- each `sᵢ` lies in `√(f)` since `D(sᵢ) ⊆ D(f)`.
  have hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k := by
    intro i
    have hle : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i) : (Spec R).Opens) ≤ PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f := by
      rw [hcov]; exact le_iSup _ i
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen_le_basicOpen_iff (s i) f).mp hle
    exact ⟨k, Ideal.mem_span_singleton.mp hk⟩
  -- `{sᵢ/1}` spans the unit ideal of `R_f` (mirror of `affine_cover_span_localizationAway`).
  have hspan : Ideal.span
      (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤ := by
    rw [← PrimeSpectrum.iSup_basicOpen_eq_top_iff]
    simp only [← PrimeSpectrum.comap_basicOpen]
    rw [← map_iSup, ← hcov, PrimeSpectrum.comap_basicOpen, eq_top_iff]
    rintro q -
    rw [PrimeSpectrum.mem_basicOpen]
    exact fun hu => q.isPrime.ne_top
      (Ideal.eq_top_of_isUnit_mem _ hu (IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit f))
  obtain ⟨q, rfl⟩ : ∃ q, p = q + 1 := ⟨p - 1, by omega⟩
  exact sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact _ _ q (sectionCechAbExact_loc M s f hmem hspan q)

end AlgebraicGeometry

# AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/CechAcyclic.lean

## Summary
- **Declarations added (3, all axiom-clean `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`):**
  - `AlgebraicGeometry.AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` (non-private)
  - `AlgebraicGeometry.SectionCechModule.dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway` (non-private)
  - `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway` (public — **the Lane-1 target**)
  - plus one private helper `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCechAbExact_loc` (mirror of `sectionCechAbExact`)
- **Declarations blocked:** none. Lane 1 fully closed.
- **Sorry count:** before = 1 → after = 1 (only the pre-existing dead `CechAcyclic.affine`, line 110,
  superseded — left untouched per PROGRESS directive). No new sorries.
- **Verification:** `lake env lean AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/CechAcyclic.lean` exits 0 (only the
  pre-existing line-75/110 `sorry` warning). `#print axioms` on all three new decls = kernel-clean.

## `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway` — RESOLVED (public target)
- **Statement:** for `M : ModuleCat R`, `s : ι → R` finite, `f : R` with
  `D(f) = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)`, the section Čech complex of `~M` over `{D(sᵢ)}` has vanishing homology in
  positive degrees. (Matches blueprint `lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`, `\lean{}` already
  pinned at blueprint line 6190.)
- **Route (B, change-of-ring):** mirrors `sectionCech_homology_exact`; the only spanning-dependent
  input is swapped for the route-B exactness. From `hcov` it derives (a) `hmem : ∀i, ∃k, f ∣ sᵢ^k`
  (via `PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen_le_basicOpen_iff` + `Ideal.mem_span_singleton`) and (b) the `R_f`-span
  `hspan` (inlined replica of `affine_cover_span_localizationAway`, which lives in the downstream
  `AffineSerreVanishing.lean` and is NOT importable here). Then
  `sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact _ _ q (sectionCechAbExact_loc M s f hmem hspan q)`.

## `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCechAbExact_loc` (private) — RESOLVED
- Verbatim copy of `sectionCechAbExact` with the final `dDiff_exact s M hs q` replaced by
  `dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway s M f hmem hspan q`. Reuses the entire tilde bridge
  (`sectionToModuleAddEquiv`, `sectionCechCofaceMatch`) unchanged — the bridge is
  spanning-hypothesis-independent.

## `AlgebraicGeometry.SectionCechModule.dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway` — RESOLVED (the math core)
- **Statement:** positive-degree `Function.Exact` of the un-localised module complex `dDiff s M`
  over `R`, given `hmem` + `hspan` (no `Ideal.span (range s) = ⊤` over `R`).
- **Proof:** instantiate the polymorphic `dDiff_exact` over `Rf = Localization.Away f` with
  `Mf = LocalizedModule (powers f) M` and family `s/1` (black-box reuse, `hspan` supplies the
  spanning datum), then transport positive-degree exactness back to the `R`-side along the degreewise
  `R`-linear isomorphisms `M_{sσ} ≅ (M_f)_{sσ}` (`IsLocalizedModule.iso` of the composite localisation
  map) via `Function.Exact.of_ladder_addEquiv_of_exact`. Per-coface naturality (`nat`) is proved by
  `IsLocalizedModule.ext` + `AwayComparison.comparison_apply` + `IsLocalizedModule.iso_symm_comp`
  (same recipe as `cechCoface_dToCech`/`phiL_naturality`).
- **Note:** needs `set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000` + `synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 800000` — the
  ladder repeatedly synthesises `AddMonoidHomClass` over the `dCoeff`-abbreviated `LocalizedModule`
  carriers (instance-search heavy, not a logical issue).

## `AlgebraicGeometry.AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` — RESOLVED (reusable infra)
- **Statement:** if `mkf : M → Mf` is `IsLocalizedModule (powers f)` and `gN : Mf → N` is
  `IsLocalizedModule (powers (algebraMap R Rf a))` (over `Rf`), with `a^j = f*h`, then the `R`-linear
  composite `gN.restrictScalars R ∘ₗ mkf` is `IsLocalizedModule (powers a)`. (Module analogue of
  `Localization.Away f` then `Away a = Away a` when `f ∣ aⁿ`.)
- **Proof:** direct via the `⟨map_units, surj, exists_of_eq⟩` constructor, clearing the extra `f^l`
  factor with `a^{jl} = f^l h^l`. Avoids the Mathlib-absent "converse of `of_restrictScalars`".

## Needs blueprint entry (mandatory report — new `lean_aux` nodes)
The following NEW non-private declarations need blueprint blocks (currently invisible to the dependency
graph until the planner/reviewer blueprints them):
1. `AlgebraicGeometry.AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` — composite-of-two-away-localisations.
   Relies only on Mathlib `IsLocalizedModule` API. Natural home: a new lemma near
   `lem:away_comparison_isLocalizedModule`, or bundled into its `\lean{...}`.
2. `AlgebraicGeometry.SectionCechModule.dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway` — route-B module-complex
   exactness. Relies on `dDiff_exact` (`lem:section_cech_module_exact`), `isLocalizedModule_comp_away`,
   `IsLocalizedModule.iso`. Natural home: a sub-lemma of `lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`.
3. `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCechAbExact_loc` (private) — bundle into the `\lean{...}` of
   `lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover` (private is NOT exempt from `unmatched`).
   The public `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway` already has its `\lean{}` pin.

## Ready for `\leanok` (sync_leanok will set deterministically)
- `lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover` (statement + proof now formalized, 0 sorry).

## Downstream follow-up (NOT this lane / not my file)
- `AffineSerreVanishing.lean`: discharge `htilde` in `affine_cech_vanishing_qcoh_of_tildeVanishing`
  / `affine_serre_vanishing_of_tildeVanishing` by plugging
  `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway (moduleSpecΓFunctor.obj F) (fun i => g i.down) f hcov p hp`
  (note `ι := ULift (Fin n)`, `cechCohomology U F' p` is defeq `(sectionCechComplex U F').homology p`,
  `0 < p ↔ 1 ≤ p`). This makes both 02KG tops unconditional. Small lane, next iter.

## Why I stopped
- **Real progress:** Lane 1 fully closed. 3 axiom-clean non-private decls + 1 private helper added:
  - `isLocalizedModule_comp_away` (CechAcyclic.lean ~885)
  - `dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway` (CechAcyclic.lean ~1215)
  - `sectionCechAbExact_loc` (CechAcyclic.lean ~1800, private)
  - `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway` (CechAcyclic.lean ~1867, the PROGRESS Lane-1 target)
  All verified kernel-clean and under a full `lake env lean` compile (exit 0).
